data.name: Intro
data.value: This site uses privacy-focused traffic analytics to understand general usage trends and improve published technical content.

data.name: Section_Analytics_Body
data.value: We use Umami to measure visits, unique visitors, most viewed pages, and traffic sources across periods such as 7 and 30 days.

data.name: Section_Data_Body
data.value: The applied setup is data-minimization oriented and does not rely on a cookie popup for normal site operation.

data.name: Section_Rights_Body
data.value: If you are in the European Union, your GDPR rights remain applicable. If you have privacy questions, please get in touch.

data.name: Section_Contact_Body
data.value: You can reach me through the profile links and professional channels available on this site.
